title: Lichamp 42 in 1 Magnetic Screwdriver Set with Detachable T Handle，DIY Ratchet Screwdriver Set with Storage Case Multi Precision Repair Tool Kit for Furniture Computer Cars Bicycle and DIY Grey
features: 【42 in 1 Ratchet Screwdriver Set】This ratcheting screwdriver set includes 8 pcs 45mm long screwdriver heads and 32 pcs 25mm short screwdrivers such as PH (4), SL (4), Torx (10), Hex (9), PZ (3), U-shaped (2), etc.Screwdriver set also has an ergonomic T handle that provides a comfortable grip. Ideal tool kit for home, work, DIY projects, professional task, for furniture assembly, home appliances, pc, computers, glasses, watch, glasses,bike and more.

【T Handle Ratchet Screwdriver】42 in 1 screwdriver set includes a ergonomic aluminum ratchet screwdriver handle with removable structure design for flexible configurations in tight spaces, which can be freely combined according to different work scenarios.Meanwhile, with 6.2 degree and 58 teeth ratchet structure, it allows smooth one-directional rotation, easily tighten or loosen screws, reducing effort by up to 80%!The handle can be served as both screwdriver and wrench, freely combinable in different installation scenarios.

【Magnetic Screwdriver Set】Each drill bit is magnetized to securely hold screws, preventing slips and improving precision. No more lost screws! The storage box includes uilt-in magnetic zone to add magnetism to the bits head at any time. It is easy to use and carry, providing more convenience for maintenance work.

【Long-lasting Material】In the 42 in 1 magnetic screwdriver set, the T-shaped handle is made of aluminum alloy, and the drill bit is made of S2 alloy steel, which is durable, hard but not brittle, ensuring that it can be used for a long time. Our multi screwdriver set uses bright, color-coded bit rings so you can spot the right tool at a glance and snap it back into place effortlessly for easy identification and more convenient use.

【Great Present and Stylish Design】With its high-quality, stylish design and compact storage case, multi bit magnetic screwdriver set is not just a tool but also a practical gift choice that will leave a lasting impression. Not only it is an exceptional present for DIY enthusiasts, handymen, and professionals, but also a great gift for Christmas, birthdays, Father's Day or any special occasion!
description: Key Features: 🔧 42-in-1 Magnetic Screwdriver Set Includes 8 x 45mm long and 32 x 25mm short bits covering: PH: PH0, PH1, PH2, PH3 SL: SL3, SL4, SL5, SL6 Torx: T40H,T5,T6,T8H,T10H,T15H,T20H,T25H,T27H,T30H Hex: H1.5, H2, H2.5, H3, H4, H5, H6，H6.35，H8 PZ: PZ1, PZ2, PZ3 U-shaped: U4, U6 Ideal for use on computers, watches, glasses, furniture, appliances, and more. ⚙️ Ratcheting T-Handle with 58-Tooth Mechanism Features a smooth 6.2-degree rotation arc for efficient tightening and loosening with minimal effort. The detachable aluminium handle allows flexible use as a screwdriver or wrench, even in confined spaces. 🧲 Built-in Magnetic Syste All bits are magnetised to grip scremws securely, reducing drops and mishandling. The storage case also includes a magnetic recharge zone to maintain magnetic strength over time. 🛠️ Durable & Ergonomic Construction Bits made from hardened S2 alloy steel for wear resistance and longevity. Lightweight aluminium T-handle offers a comfortable, non-slip grip. Colour-coded bit rings enable quick identification and easy storage. 🎁 Professional Storage Case & Gift-Ready Packaging Housed in a compact, sturdy case with custom-fit compartments, this set is easy to carry and store. Its premium presentation makes it an excellent gift for Christmas, birthdays, Father’s Day, or special occasions. Ideal For: Home DIY Projects Electronics and Device Repair Bicycle and Automotive Maintenance Furniture Assembly Professional Toolkits Gift for DIY Enthusiasts and Technicians Packaging Includes: 1 x T-Handle Ratchet Screwdriver 40 x Precision Bits (Short and Long) 1 x Compact Storage Case
